execution: vitest run for pure-function grouping logic (TC-12..TC-15, TC-18, TC-19): 10/10 passed in 296ms
vite build for production bundle: success in 1.24s
code review of Vue components for UI/visual assertions (TC-1..TC-11, TC-16, TC-17): grep + line-level verification
methodology.exclusions: TC-20/21/22 (Settings UI) — require runtime interaction, deferred to non-core pass

vitest_unit.evidence: Test Files: 1 passed (1), Tests: 10 passed (10), Duration: 296ms

cases.name: AgentRunBlock 容器 - streaming 状态条
cases.evidence: AgentRunBlock.vue L6-8: ternary class 'run-status-bar--streaming' when isStreaming=true. L181-191: @keyframes run-sweep slides background-position 100%→-100% over 1.5s infinite. L6: h-[3px] + overflow-hidden. Base: var(--accent), overlay: rgba(255,255,255,0.3) translucent sweep.

cases.name: AgentRunBlock 容器 - complete 状态条
cases.evidence: AgentRunBlock.vue L7: ternary returns 'bg-border' when isStreaming=false. bg-border maps to var(--border), static color, no animation class.

cases.name: AgentRunBlock footer 字段
cases.evidence: AgentRunBlock.vue footer (L53-60): three spans — (1) stepCount = sections.filter(s=>s.type!=='text').length (L123-125); (2) formattedElapsed = formatTime(elapsedMs) (L177), elapsedMs from thinking+toolCalls timestamps + liveTimer during streaming (L151-175); (3) standaloneToolCount = toolCalls.filter(tc=>standalone.has(tc.toolName)).length (L127-131).

cases.name: Text block 渲染
cases.evidence: AgentRunBlock.vue L24-36: v-else-if='section.type==="text" && message.content', class='msg__body select-text py-1 leading-[1.6] text-fg text-xs'. Rendered via useMarkdownRender → renderedContent → v-html. Streaming cursor (animated blink span) when isStreaming.

cases.name: Write toolCall 独立卡片
cases.evidence: settings.ts L19: standaloneTools default=['write','edit']. message-layout.ts L85-90: isMergeBlock returns false for write → grouped as type='standalone'. AgentRunBlock.vue L39: <StandaloneToolCard :tool-call='section.toolCall'>. StandaloneToolCard.vue renders toolName, resolvedPath, statusLabel badge, elapsedDisplay.

cases.name: Edit toolCall 独立卡片
cases.evidence: edit in default standaloneTools (settings.ts:19). Same path as write: isMergeBlock→false → type='standalone' → StandaloneToolCard. Identical card treatment.

cases.name: 自定义工具独立卡片
cases.evidence: message-layout.ts L121-122: toolCall not in ALL_PI_TOOLS → isCustom=true → section type='customTool'. AgentRunBlock.vue L46: v-else-if='section.type==="customTool"' renders <StandaloneToolCard>. ToolCall resolved at L101-104: message.toolCalls.find(tc=>tc.id===block.refId).

cases.name: MergeBlock chip 统计
cases.evidence: MergeBlock.vue chips computed (L97-118): iterates blocks, counts thinkingCount + groups toolCalls by toolName via Map. Template L14-21 renders each chip as span with class merge-chip--{variant}. For 3 thinking+5 read+2 grep → '思考 ×3 · read ×5 · grep ×2'.

cases.name: MergeBlock 展开/折叠
cases.evidence: MergeBlock.vue L17: @click='toggleExpand'. L68-70: expanded=ref(false), toggleExpand flips it. L34: v-show='expanded' on detail blocks. Chevron SVG (L26-32) rotates via class 'merge-bar__chevron--open' → transform:rotate(180deg).

cases.name: MergeBlock streaming - thinking 状态
cases.evidence: MergeBlock.vue L138-142: checks lastThinking.endTime===undefined → returns '思考中...'. Pulse dot (L4: merge-stream__pulse) with @keyframes merge-pulse (L261-264: opacity 1→0.4→1, scale 1→0.7→1, 2s infinite). streamElapsed (L156-161) via useLiveTimer(200).

cases.name: MergeBlock streaming - tool running 状态
cases.evidence: MergeBlock.vue L145-150: finds toolCalls.find(tc=>tc.status==='running') → returns `${tc.toolName} ${toolPath(tc.input)}`. toolPath extracts file_path/path/command from input. Format matches 'read src/main.ts'.

cases.name: 分组 - 合并+text+合并 (AC-5 场景A)
cases.evidence: vitest: TC-12 passed. Input: contentBlocks=[thk,tc-read,tc-bash,text,thk,tc-read,thk,tc-grep], standalone={write,edit}. Output: sectionTypes=['merge','text','merge']. blocks[0]=[thk1,tcRead1,tcBash], blocks[2]=[thk2,tcRead2,thk3,tcGrep].

cases.name: 分组 - edit 独立展示 (AC-5 场景B)
cases.evidence: vitest: TC-13 passed. Input: contentBlocks=[thk,text,edit,text], standalone={write,edit}. Output: sectionTypes=['merge','text','standalone']. blocks[0]=[thk1], blocks[2]=[editTc].

cases.name: 分组 - 混合含 standalone + customTool (AC-5 场景C)
cases.evidence: vitest: TC-14 passed. Input: contentBlocks=[thk,tc-read,write,thk,tc-bash,text,subagent,text], standalone={write,edit}. Output: sectionTypes=['merge','standalone','merge','text','customTool']. blocks[0]=[thk1,tcRead], blocks[1]=[write], blocks[2]=[thk2,tcBash], sections[3]=text, blocks[4]=[subagent].

cases.name: 分组 - standaloneTools 变更影响 (AC-5 场景D)
cases.evidence: vitest: TC-15 passed (2 assertions). Test 1: standalone={write,edit,bash}+[thk,tc-bash] → ['merge','standalone']. Test 2: standalone={write,edit}+[thk,tc-bash] → ['merge']. Confirms bash classification reactive to standaloneTools set.

cases.name: 主题 - light 模式
cases.evidence: grep for hex colors (#xxx / rgb()) in all 3 components → zero hits. All colors via CSS variables: var(--accent), var(--border), var(--bg), var(--fg), var(--muted), var(--success), var(--danger), var(--surface). color-mix(in oklch, var(--x) 12%, transparent) for chip/badge backgrounds. Only non-var: rgba(255,255,255,0.3) in run-sweep keyframes (translucent overlay, theme-independent).

cases.name: 主题 - dark 模式
cases.evidence: Same as TC-16. All colors via CSS variables, adapt through [data-theme] selectors. color-mix() with oklch works in both light and dark. rgba(255,255,255,0.3) sweep overlay valid on dark accent backgrounds.

notes: Core scope: TC-1..TC-17 (AC-1..AC-6). TC-18/TC-19 covered by vitest but belong to backward-compat scope.
TC-12..TC-15 (grouping): verified via vitest unit tests with deterministic assertions matching spec AC-5.
TC-1..TC-11 (visual/UI): verified via code review against spec AC-1..AC-5. grep confirms no hardcoded colors.
TC-16/TC-17 (theme): grep for hex/rgb colors in all 3 components → zero hits. All colors via CSS vars.
TC-20/21/22 (Settings UI interaction): require runtime interaction, deferred to non-core pass.
All build gates: vitest=10/10 pass, vue-tsc=0 errors, vite build=success.
